cluster.title: Desktop install & boot
cluster.summary: End-to-end trace from `copilot` CLI install through runtime staging (pinned CPython + zonky Postgres + service source, ad-hoc signed), Electron main boot, the supervisor's secrets/ports/postgres/migrations/services/health phases, transport + auth-posture wiring, and the renderer's BootGate → SignInGate → ChatShell mount. Health is good overall (fail-closed staging and secrets, curated child envs, orphan reclaim), but the packaged DMG path drops the wallet web assets, the ai-backend env lacks BACKEND_BASE_URL at this base, and the run-local harness has drifted from the real supervisor.

nodes.summary: Desktop install & boot flow: copilot CLI -> staged runtime -> Electron supervisor -> embedded PG + 3 services -> renderer shell.
`copilot` launcher: platform gate, payload/dev layout resolution, stage orchestration, doctor/repair/uninstall, Electron spawn with COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR + COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1.

Stages the self-contained runtime: sha256-verified CPython + Postgres downloads, per-service pip installs (--require-hashes), web assets, macOS ad-hoc signing, staging-manifest.json completion marker.
Pinned url+sha256 inputs for python-build-standalone 3.13.14 and zonky embedded-postgres 17.10 per platform-arch.
Prepack: mirrors the monorepo subset (services src, shared py packages, stage.mjs, built desktop app, frontend dist, bundled google-oauth.json) into the npm payload.
Clones Electron.app into a branded 0xCopilot.app shell (plist rewrite + icns swap + ad-hoc re-sign) so CLI launches present correctly in the Dock.
Headless Node harness that boots the staged runtime and smoke-tests health/providers/dev-IdP-absence; duplicates and has drifted from the real supervisor (F3).
Electron main: single-instance lock, app:// protocol + CSP, boot window, supervise-or-dev decision, transport/auth/IPC wiring, ordered before-quit shutdown.
ServiceSupervisor state machine (secrets -> ports -> postgres -> migrations -> services -> health -> ready) composed with real adapters in desktop-supervisor.ts; emits BootStatusPayload.
Generate-once boot secrets (auth secret, service token, vault secret, pg password, audit HMAC key) persisted safeStorage-encrypted; unreadable blob is a fatal, never regenerated.
Embedded Postgres lifecycle: one-time initdb (scram, atlas superuser), orphaned-postmaster reclaim, pg_ctl -w start, database creation via staged python+psycopg.
Curated child env builder: passthrough allowlist + per-service contract table (DB URLs, SIWE_ORIGIN, FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR, registry URLs, file-store flag).
Per-child babysitter: uvicorn spawn, exponential-backoff restart, crash-loop fatal at >=5 crashes/5min, rotating logs, SIGTERM->SIGKILL stop.
Production-vs-dev posture (app.isPackaged OR COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1, dev overrides win); production forces mode away from dev-mint so the Sarah Chen persona can never mint.
Sign-in flows owned by main: dev-mint/local-key SIWE, Google via facade + loopback + system browser, wallet via facade-served wallet.html handoff; sessions in safeStorage, bearer never crosses IPC.
IPC <-> Transport bridge: request proxy + SSE subscription lifecycle over WebTransport (bearer attached in main, withBearerRefresh 401 retry).
contextBridge `window.bridge` with a channel allowlist; boot/update status are stateful channels replayed to late subscribers.
Renderer composition: DeploymentProfileProvider(single_user_desktop) -> BootGate -> SignInGate -> ChatShell + DestinationOutlet + SettingsMount + PaletteHost over IpcTransport.
Desktop-native binders feeding the chat-surface destination components via the Transport port; mirrors the web binders' projections without importing apps/frontend.
electron-builder packaging: extraResources maps resources/runtime only (drops resources/web — F1), sign-nested.js pre-signs bundled Mach-Os, GitHub-releases update feed.

edges.label: spawn stage.mjs --dest ~/.0xcopilot --adhoc-sign
reads pinned url+sha256 entries
download python-build-standalone tarball (sha256-verified)
download zonky embedded-postgres jar (sha256-verified)
pip install -r requirements.txt (--require-hashes for backend/facade)
copies services/backend src+migrations+scripts into the staged tree
copies services/ai-backend src+migrations+config+skills into the staged tree
copies services/backend-facade src into the staged tree
pip installs packages/service-contracts + packages/audit-chain --no-deps
stages apps/frontend/dist (wallet.html) to <dest>/web for the facade
prepack builds and bundles apps/desktop/out into the npm payload
prepack builds apps/frontend and ships dist (wallet.html) in the payload
ensureBrandedShell before launch (macOS)
spawn electron <appDir> with COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR + COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1
COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1 drives production auth posture
createDesktopSupervisor().start() when shouldSupervise
loadOrCreateBootSecrets (safeStorage blob)
createPostgres + ensureDatabase(atlas_backend, atlas_ai)
initdb / pg_ctl -w start / stop of the embedded cluster
python scripts/migrate.py apply then uvicorn backend_app.desktop_app:app
uvicorn runtime_api.app:app with RUNTIME_START_IN_PROCESS_WORKER=true
uvicorn backend_facade.app:app with BACKEND_URL/AI_BACKEND_URL/FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR
ENTERPRISE_AUTH_SECRET, SIWE_ORIGIN, GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET into the backend child
RUNTIME_STORE_BACKEND=postgres|file, RUNTIME_FILE_STORE_ROOT, RUNTIME_MIGRATIONS_AUTO_APPLY=false
health gate GET /v1/health (90s budget) before ready
resolveAuthPosture selects dev-mint vs fail-closed oidc mode
GET /v1/auth/oidc/google/start + callback; wallet.html handoff; SIWE verify
system-browser Google consent via facade-brokered auth_url + loopback redirect
SIWE wallet sign-in via facade-served wallet.html (EIP-6963 + personal_sign)
WebTransport request/SSE to facadeUrl, bearer attached in main
subscribeServerSentEvents relayed to renderer stream.event channel
allowlisted invoke/on channels (transport, auth, boot.status)
BootStatusPayload on boot.status; BootGate blocks until phase=ready
mounts ChatShell + profile/destination SSOT from @0x-copilot/chat-surface
binds Chats/Projects/Activity/Tools/Skills destination components over the Transport port
IpcTransport + CHANNELS (boot.status) + BootStatusPayloadSchema from @0x-copilot/chat-transport
registerAll surface renderers + design-system styles
extraResources maps resources/runtime -> resourcesPath/runtime (resources/web is dropped — F1)
electron-updater GitHub releases feed (packaged+signed builds only)
initdb -U postgres -A trust + pg_ctl start (drifted from supervisor — F3)
smoke: /v1/health, /v1/auth/providers, dev-IdP absence
reads staged tree at COPILOT_RUNTIME_DIR/runtime/<platform>-<arch> (resource contract)
